feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Get My Pretty Name Outta Your Mouth
entry.summary:
Author: Reckoning1187

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,513Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 70

Summary: Nightwing died. No one wanted to believe it. But Jason had been put in the ground only a year before, and no one could deny it. The family was broken; Bruce threw himself into work, Tim left the manor, Damien went rogue, and Alfred– he just tried to keep everything from falling apart more than it already had.Months later, Dick Grayson woke up in a small hospital in Central City, alone, with nothing to his name, and no memory of ever being Robin or Nightwing. With no family and no calling, Dick followed the only lead to his past– Gotham City. And… the Red Hood? OrMy need to tell an atrociously-hurt/wonderfully-comfort fic about Jason being a traumatized and dangerous mafia boss, and Dick being a confused, traumatized, and yet wonderfully-powerful crime-boss-in-training. And then make them kiss.  :)

entry.title: Batcest: Dick is a Slut
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,025Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Dick and Jason get freaky in an alley, Jason calls him a slut and when some dudes see them they make Dick feel worse.After a bad night on patrol, he just wants to take a shower and get in bed with his other lovers: Tim and Damian, but they ALSO call him a slut and that's IT.He gets into a vicious fight with Jason and only Alfred's insight saves them from making more mistakes.Cue in: Dick's family and lovers comforting him, begging for forgiveness and talking about it. Gut-wrenching stuff here, so sorry Dick and Jason.Warning: underage because Tim and Damian are still minors.

entry.title: Renegade
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 315,585Chapters: 42/?Kudos: 2,407

Summary: Five years after Robin had vanished holding Starfire’s body, the second Robin, Jason Todd, disappeared on his second mission with the Teen Titans. When he woke up in an unfamiliar place, Jason had no idea what would happen to him in the coming months, and that soon he would know the former Robin—now Renegade—intimately, during his long captivity. Or: The one where Dick Grayson took Slade’s offer to be his apprentice and Jason pays the price. This fic now has a comic version!

entry.title: Hush Little One, You Are Safe Now
entry.summary:
Author: Gaynightwing03

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,314Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 1,315

Summary: Damian has tried his best to become the partner that his Father needs, but it seems that his Father does not approve of Robin's style and methods. A night of yelling is enough to set things in motion, were Damain realizes that his Father isn't who he wants to be partners with, but perhaps a certain brother will aid where his Father has not.

entry.title: The Reckoning
entry.summary:
Author: TrivialCrow

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,956Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Jason Todd is a submissive owned by the Wayne Family. He is a pawn, a tool in the ever-expanding ambition of the powerful and terrifying Wayne patriarch. He is also both an obsession and a possession to Wayne’s equally dangerous heir, Dick Grayson. When Bruce realizes that Dick’s feelings for Jason extend beyond mere amusement, he bargains Jason away to secure an alliance and rid himself of a threat. But Dick refuses to surrender Jason without a fight, even if that fight is against the man who raised him.

entry.title: Batcest Time: Revenge
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,125Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 22

Summary: Jason breaks when Damian asks him to be fucked with a crowbar. Sure, it was in the heat of the moment, but then he just left Damian there, barely staying in the house for days, barely speaking... And Damian finds out Jason was raped and beaten by Joker before dying. After being being attacked by mistake by Jason, he convinces his older brother to tell the rest of the family about what happened.   A few days later, Dick and Damian are caught in the act by Slade. Damian has an idea... why don't they ask him to bring someone back from the dead so they can make them pay?

entry.title: seven days at the country club
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,135Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 150

Summary: The Wayne Enterprises Board wants Dick, Jason, and Tim to spend a week at a country club filming a documentary commemorating the life and legacy of Bruce Wayne. Except, it's kind of hard to act like a normal, all-American family on screen, when off-screen, they're getting busy getting on each other's nerves, in each other's business, and into each other's pants.

entry.title: Common Grounds
entry.summary:
Author: MewSefet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,760Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 196

Summary: What happens when you accidently start dating your son's English teacher? When Dick and Jason find themselves pushed together on a rainy day in their usual coffee shop, neither of them expect their lives are already intertwined. How casual flirting and mutual interest turns into dating, turns into an identity reveal that neither of them expect, but should have figured out earlier. Eg. the Detective!Dick Grayson/Teacher!Jason Todd fic that no one asked for. Including Jason is Damian's teacher, and Damian is 80% Dick's son and identity shenanigans in a Civillian!AU.

entry.title: Take me home and show me the sun
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,058Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 25

Summary: He had failed Blüdhaven. Three people were turned tonight, only because he hadn't been fast enough, smart enough. Because he, ultimately, didn't deserve to be called a hero. He wasn't worthy of the title. He didn't know if he wanted to open comms tonight; he didn't know if he could handle being pitied. He didn't deserve it. But alas, duty was calling. He raised his hand to reach for his comms line and… The earpiece was cracked. He grabbed the device quickly, panicking, and just as he had feared, the only means of communication he had available crumbled in his fingers. He had no contact with the outside world anymore.

entry.title: Shot Through the Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SaviouroftheStars

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,073Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Jason Todd died once. It didn’t stick. Now a revenant with a stuttering heartbeat and a soul that won’t stay buried, he hunts the things that crawl out of the dark. But nothing he’s fought, not demons, not ghosts, not monsters wearing human skin, comes close to the pair now stalking the hunter circuit. They’re carving through veteran hunters like wheat. One is a towering brute in a mask.The other is a beautiful, shackled young man whose presence feels like gravity—quiet, strange, and impossible to ignore. Every instinct Jason has screams danger. Something about him feels ancient, bound, wrong. And yet Jason can’t look away. He’s going to have to kill them both. He just wishes the pretty one wasn’t making the job so damn complicated.

entry.title: You are precious to me.
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_dreamy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 158,719Chapters: 58/?Kudos: 353

Summary: Damian had been sexually assaulted and after that his father saw the video, he just want to run away. That is how he end up living with Dick. Dick is conflicated about his feelings for Jason. Damian is now under his care and him and Bruce are still awkward around each other. And something is up with Tim but he doesn't know what. Jason is waiting for Dick to give him a proper answer. His hate for Bruce is too strong and he do not feel welcome in their perfect little family. or Everyone is dealing with things and their family is slowly falling appart. Would they succeed to all get along and get over the mistakes of the past?

entry.title: Glass Rain
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 238,697Chapters: 52/54Kudos: 1,867

Summary: Jason Todd wakes up in the wrong Gotham. Here, he stayed dead. Here, his death broke his family so completely they became the monsters they once fought. Dick Grayson haunts the skyline with wings and talons, Barbara Gordon moves like a spider made of shadow, and something that might have once been Batman rules from a corrupted cave. The city is quarantined, the air tastes of ozone and old blood, and Jason should be running. Instead, he finds himself drawn to the creature that was once his brother—the one stalking him through twisted streets with eyes that still burn with something almost human. Some hunts, it turns out, go both ways.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Dick Grayson/Jason Todd
  • Jason Todd
  • Dick Grayson

entry.title: red at the bone
entry.summary:
Author: badalice

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,048Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 28

Summary: Under the aegis of the Order of St. George, the House of Wayne has silently protected the children of Gotham from the monsters that stalk them for nearly two decades. Its members live dangerous, lonely lives, guardians of a secret that the Order will kill to keep safe. When Dick Grayson's estranged brother Jason Todd resurfaces in small town Kansas, on the trail of one of the most dangerous types of monsters the Order hunts and kills, House Dragon Bruce Wayne sends Dick to assist—and, just maybe, to bring Jason back into the fold. Some wounds, though, run too deep, and some promises lie too broken, and Dick knows all too well the welcome that he'll receive if he goes—but when it comes to Jason, he'll do whatever it takes.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: no light, no light
entry.summary:
Author: pigeonegg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,639Chapters: 4/9Kudos: 165

Summary: Jason falls asleep trying not to desperately inhale the faint scent of Dick’s cologne, trying not to play the words honey and sweetheart over and over in his head, trying not to think of Dick, shirtless in the bathroom, rolling his eyes and walking out without saying a word. He tries an awful lot and fails anyway. This is where it starts: the slamming of a bedroom door. Jason is twelve, and Dick hates him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
